parameters.name: strategy
parameters.label: Strategy
parameters.description: Decides when to update values based on pick interactions.

parameters.name: clearprev
parameters.label: Clear Previous Pick on New Pick
parameters.description: This parameter is only enabled when the Strategy is set to Hold Last Picked. When this is on, starting a new pick on empty space will clear the values. When off, the last values will be held if the pi

parameters.name: responsetime
parameters.label: Response Time
parameters.description: Determines when the values are updated.

parameters.name: pickradius
parameters.label: Pick Radius
parameters.description: Controls the radius of the search area for the pick. If nothing is found at the pick's center it will keep searching for geometry in the search area defined by the Pick Radius.

parameters.name: pickradstep
parameters.label: Pick Radial Step
parameters.description: Used to reduce the searching within the search area. The search area is sampled at locations that correspond to 'spokes' outwards from the center pick point.

parameters.name: pickcirstep
parameters.label: Pick Circular Step
parameters.description: Used to reduce the searching within the search area. The search area is sampled at locations that correspond to 'rings' outwards from the center pick point.

parameters.name: rendertop
parameters.label: Render/RenderPass TOP
parameters.description: Specifies which render to sample.

parameters.name: usepickableflags
parameters.label: Use Pickable Flags
parameters.description: When turned on only geometry whose is on can be selected by the Render Pick . The is found on all components.

parameters.name: includenonpickable
parameters.label: Include Non-Pickable Objects
parameters.description: Includes the non-pickable objects in the picking algorithm such that non-pickable objects may occlude pickable objects.  For example, if there is only one pickable object in the scene with lots of add

parameters.name: pickingby
parameters.label: Picking by
parameters.description: Determines how the pick location is set.

parameters.name: panel
parameters.label: Panel
parameters.description: Specifies which panel component to use when picking by panel.

parameters.name: panelvalue
parameters.label: Panel Value
parameters.description: Specifies with panel value to use to trigger the pick when picking by panel.

parameters.name: picku
parameters.label: U
parameters.description: Sets the u coordinate when picking by parameters.

parameters.name: pickv
parameters.label: V
parameters.description: Sets the v coordinate when picking by parameters.

parameters.name: select
parameters.label: Select
parameters.description: When picking by parameters, picking is active when this parameter = 1.

parameters.name: activatecallbacks
parameters.label: Activate Callbacks
parameters.description: Enables for each pick event.

parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: to a containing callbacks for pick event received.

parameters.name: position
parameters.label: Fetch Position
parameters.description: Returns the position of the point picked on the geometry. Channels

parameters.name: normal
parameters.label: Fetch Normal
parameters.description: Returns the normals of the point picked on the geometry. Channels

parameters.name: referenceobj
parameters.label: Reference Object
parameters.description: Object used when fetching position or normals .

parameters.name: color
parameters.label: Fetch Point Color
parameters.description: Returns the point color of the point picked on the geometry. Channels

parameters.name: uv
parameters.label: Fetch Texture UV
parameters.description: Returns the texture coordinates of the point picked on the geometry. Channels

parameters.name: path
parameters.label: Fetch Object Path
parameters.description: Return the path to the object that is picked. This result requires and with its parameter referecning the Render Pick .

parameters.name: depth
parameters.label: Fetch Depth
parameters.description: Returns the depth of the point picked on the geometry. This value a non-linear ratio of the point's position between the near and far planes of the . Channel is

parameters.name: instanceid
parameters.label: Fetch Instance ID
parameters.description: Returns the ID of the object. This will always be 0 if instancing is off. Channel is

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
